title: Sunlit Artisan Studio Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Sunlit Artisan Studio Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: premium editorial portrait of adult East Asian creative director with calm confidence and realistic proportions in sunlit artisan studio with wooden table, clay tools, drying shelves, linen apron, and soft dust in the air. Subject: adult East Asian creative director with calm confidence and realistic proportions is photographed with realistic proportions, natural expression, readable face detail, and confident editorial presence. Scene: sunlit artisan studio with wooden table, clay tools, drying shelves, linen apron, and soft dust in the air provides the environment, depth, atmosphere, and contextual props without distracting from the person. Composition: Fixed portrait composition with clean body language, readable hands, balanced crop, and magazine-style negative space. Style: High-end editorial photography with realistic skin texture, refined wardrobe detail, clean color grade, and polished fashion-magazine finish. Color Palette: Wardrobe and setting colors stay harmonious, with restrained contrast, realistic skin tones, and premium editorial grading. Lighting: Soft cinematic key light with natural falloff, subtle rim detail, readable facial structure, and clean shadow depth. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: No unnecessary text; any incidental labels stay minimal, intentional, and secondary to the image. Signature Elements: adult East Asian creative director with calm confidence and realistic proportions, cream knit cardigan, pleated skirt, ankle boots, delicate earrings, and soft editorial layers, sunlit artisan studio with wooden table, clay tools, drying shelves, linen apron, and soft dust in the air, and three-quarter stance with one hand lifted gently, calm gaze, readable hands, and graceful posture define the reusable editorial portrait recipe. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
